# 004 Core IR

Status: draft
Source of truth: libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/ir/

## Purpose

Describe the normalized semantic model that workflow execution consumes.

## Normative Model

- WorkflowIR is derived at run creation.

- PR1 does not cache WorkflowIR in Postgres.

- Trigger maps normalize to ordered IR trigger lists.

## Examples

A job dependency map becomes explicit IR edges once the normalizer is introduced.

## Adding Or Changing This Concept

Update IR types, normalizer tests, static semantics, runtime docs, and generated docs when adding IR concepts.
